name: Pineapple Bars Supreme
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (2 Cans) Crushed Pineapple including Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Measure 2 tablespoons crushed pineapple for frosting and set aside.
3. Combine sugar, flour, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl.
4. Add oil, eggs, pineapple, vanilla extract, and lemon extract.
5. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 17x11 jelly roll pan.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and immediately frost with Coconutty Cream Cheese Frosting.
9. Cool completely.
Coconutty Cream Cheese Frosting
1/4 cup margarine, softened
1 - 3 oz package cream cheese, softened
3 cups sifted powdered sugar
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
2 tablespoons crushed pineapple (reserved from cake)
1 cup flaked coconut
1/2 cup chopped nuts
1. Beat margarine and cream cheese together until smooth.
2. Add powdered sugar, vanilla extract, and crushed pineapple; beat until well blended.
3. Stir in flaked coconut and chopped nuts.
